steps.title: Keep the subject intact
steps.content: The sentence's subject is "Her portrait of novelist Zadie Smith," followed directly by the verb "is displayed." No punctuation should separate the subject from its verb.

steps.title: Reject interrupting marks
steps.content:
• Choice A inserts a colon between the subject and verb.
  • Choice B inserts a dash between the subject and verb.
  • Choice D inserts a comma between the subject and verb.
The remaining choice leaves the subject-verb connection uninterrupted. The answer is C.
